title_en: The Legacy of Tabaqat al-Kabir in Islamic Biographical Literature
title_ar: إرث الطبقات الكبير في الأدب البيوغرافي الإسلامي
content_en:
Tabaqat al-Kabir established the genre of generational biographical dictionaries that became one of the most productive in the Islamic intellectual tradition. Ibn Sa'd's work was immediately recognized as authoritative and was used as a primary source by every subsequent hadith scholar and historian who addressed the early Islamic period.

Influence on Hadith Criticism

The most direct impact of Tabaqat al-Kabir was on the science of hadith narrator criticism. The biographical information it provides — dates of birth and death, teachers and students, places of residence, reliability assessments from contemporaries — was the raw material that hadith critics used to evaluate the chains of transmission in the hadith collections. Without biographical dictionaries like Ibn Sa'd's, the hadith critical tradition could not have functioned.

Later hadith biographical dictionaries — particularly Ibn Abi Hatim's Al-Jarh wa al-Tadil, al-Mizzi's Tahdhib al-Kamal, and al-Dhahabi's Siyar Alam al-Nubala — all drew on and supplemented the information in Tabaqat al-Kabir. They acknowledged Ibn Sa'd as a foundational source and preserved his assessments while adding later information and updating conclusions in light of additional evidence.

The Tabaqat Tradition After Ibn Sa'd

The tabaqat genre Ibn Sa'd established became one of the most productive in Islamic literature. Specialized tabaqat works followed for specific categories of scholars: tabaqat works for Shafi'i jurists, Maliki scholars, Hanbali scholars, Sufis, Quran reciters, hadith masters, grammarians, physicians, and many other groups. The principle of organizing biography by generation within a specific scholarly tradition proved extraordinarily fruitful as a way of tracing the transmission of knowledge and the development of specialized disciplines.

Some of the most important specialized tabaqat include: Tabaqat al-Sufiyyah by Abu Abd al-Rahman al-Sulami (d. 412 AH), which established the biographical tradition for Sufi masters; Tabaqat al-Shafi'iyyah al-Kubra by Taj al-Din al-Subki (d. 771 AH), the comprehensive biography of Shafi'i scholars; and the many regional and disciplinary tabaqat compiled by scholars of different cities and traditions over the following centuries.

Ibn Sa'd as a Historical Source

Beyond the hadith tradition, Tabaqat al-Kabir is invaluable as a historical source for the social, political, and cultural history of early Islam. The biographical details it preserves — daily lives, family relationships, economic situations, political involvements, and personal piety practices — give historians access to the texture of early Islamic society that more formal historical chronicles do not provide.

The women's biographies in Tabaqat al-Kabir have been particularly important for feminist and social historians of early Islam. They document the active religious lives of early Muslim women, their roles as transmitters of knowledge, their relationships with the Prophet and his household, and the social conditions of Muslim women in the first and second Islamic centuries. This material provides an indispensable counterweight to the tendency of later Islamic scholarship to marginalize women's historical contributions. Ibn Sa'd's comprehensive approach — including women as full subjects of biography rather than merely as supporting characters in men's stories — reflects an early Islamic historical tradition that later generations partially abandoned but that modern scholars have recognized as a valuable inheritance.
title_id: Warisan Thabaqat al-Kabir dalam Literatur Biografi Islam
content_id:
Thabaqat al-Kabir mendirikan genre kamus biografi generasional yang menjadi salah satu yang paling produktif dalam tradisi intelektual Islam. Karya Ibn Sa'd segera diakui sebagai otoritatif dan digunakan sebagai sumber utama oleh setiap ulama hadis dan sejarawan berikutnya yang membahas periode Islam awal.

Pengaruh pada Kritik Hadis

Dampak paling langsung dari Thabaqat al-Kabir adalah pada ilmu kritik perawi hadis. Informasi biografi yang disediakan — tanggal lahir dan wafat, guru dan murid, tempat tinggal, penilaian keandalan dari rekan-rekan sezaman — adalah bahan baku yang digunakan oleh para kritikus hadis untuk mengevaluasi sanad-sanad transmisi dalam koleksi-koleksi hadis. Tanpa kamus biografi seperti karya Ibn Sa'd, tradisi kritis hadis tidak dapat berfungsi.

Kamus biografi hadis kemudian — khususnya Al-Jarh wat-Ta'dil karya Ibn Abi Hatim, Tahdzib al-Kamal karya al-Mizzi, dan Siyar A'lam an-Nubala karya adz-Dzahabi — semuanya bersandar pada dan melengkapi informasi dalam Thabaqat al-Kabir. Mereka mengakui Ibn Sa'd sebagai sumber foundational dan melestarikan penilaian-penilaiannya sambil menambahkan informasi kemudian dan memperbarui kesimpulan-kesimpulan berdasarkan bukti tambahan.

Tradisi Thabaqat Setelah Ibn Sa'd

Genre thabaqat yang Ibn Sa'd dirikan menjadi salah satu yang paling produktif dalam literatur Islam. Karya-karya thabaqat terspesialisasi menyusul untuk kategori-kategori ulama tertentu: karya-karya thabaqat untuk ahli hukum Syafi'i, ulama Maliki, ulama Hanbali, ulama Sufi, qari' Al-Qur'an, maestro hadis, ahli tata bahasa, dokter, dan banyak kelompok lainnya. Prinsip mengorganisir biografi berdasarkan generasi dalam tradisi ilmiah tertentu terbukti luar biasa produktif sebagai cara untuk melacak transmisi pengetahuan dan pengembangan disiplin-disiplin yang terspesialisasi.

Ibn Sa'd sebagai Sumber Sejarah

Di luar tradisi hadis, Thabaqat al-Kabir sangat berharga sebagai sumber sejarah untuk sejarah sosial, politik, dan budaya Islam awal. Detail-detail biografis yang dilestarikannya — kehidupan sehari-hari, hubungan keluarga, situasi ekonomi, keterlibatan politik, dan praktik kesalehan pribadi — memberi sejarawan akses ke tekstur masyarakat Islam awal yang tidak disediakan oleh kronik sejarah yang lebih formal. Biografi-biografi perempuan dalam Thabaqat al-Kabir sangat penting bagi sejarawan feminis dan sosial Islam awal, mendokumentasikan kehidupan keagamaan aktif perempuan Muslim awal dan memberikan penyeimbang yang sangat diperlukan terhadap kecenderungan untuk meminggirkan kontribusi historis perempuan.
